---
title: "IDENTITY_LINK"
generated: true
description: "The identity link :math:`g( mu) =  mu`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats._family`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:IDENTITY_LINK -->
```python
IDENTITY_LINK = Link(name='identity', link=_identity, linkinv=_identity, mu_eta=_ones_like)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:IDENTITY_LINK -->
The identity link $g(\mu) = \mu$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
